failures.description: The catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from retrieving the evidence needed to answer the cheapest available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan were aligned with the user request: search the product catalog for available Electric Kettles sorted by ascending price. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the planned arguments. The failure was an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: ProductCatalogSearch returned CatalogServiceTimeoutError with message 'catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms'. No later step resolved the timeout or obtained catalog evidence.
